author: doll-agent
content: Single commit covering everything from this session: workspace bump 0.2.10 -> 0.2.11, major dep upgrades (pyo3 0.28, arrow 58, polars 0.53, zip 8, getrandom 0.4, rand_core 0.10, etc.), API migrations (PyO3 attach API, getrandom::fill), workspace clippy clean at -D warnings -W pedantic -W nursery, README + CHANGELOG updates. 2716 tests pass.
